name: Creamy Turkey Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 ribs celery with leaves, cut into 1/4 inch
5 medium carrots, cut into 1/4 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, sauté onion and celery in butter until tender, about 10 minutes.
2. Stir in the flour and seasonings; gradually add milk, stirring constantly until thickened.
3. Add turkey and carrots. Gradually add enough broth to achieve desired soup consistency.
4. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Add peas; cover and simmer for another 15 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
6. Yield: 6-8 servings.
